site.title: Sehlopha sa Mošomo sa Boditšhabatšhaba sa Phihlelelo
site.tagline: Go tloga go nyakegong ya go hwetšagala go ya go di-repo tša setšhaba
nav.label: Sa mathomo
meta.home.description: IATF e fetoša dinyakwa tša kgonthe tša go fihlelela go ba bobolokelo bja phatlalatša bja mothopo wo o bulegilego.
meta.projects.description: Hlahloba diprotšeke tša go fihlelela batho bohle tšeo di gatišitšwego ka IATF.
meta.propose.description: Kgopela projeke ya go fihlelela go tšwa go IATF ka Wepesaete, ka e-mail goba ka Discord.
meta.governance.description: Bala kamoo IATF e amogelago diprotšeke ka gona, e laolago bobolokelo bja tšona le go boloka mošomo o le pepeneneng.
meta.join.description: Ditsela tša go tšea karolo go IATF: go tsenya letsogo ka khoutu, go fetolela, go leka goba go hlokomela protšeke.
meta.accessibility.description: Kamoo IATF e ikemišeditšego go boloka wepesaete ye e hwetšagala le kamoo go ka begwago lepheko la go hwetšagala.
meta.transparency.description: Direkoto tša setšhaba tša IATF: diphetho, diprotšeke le dikaonafatšo di dula di bulegile ka go itiragalela.
actions.emailProjects: Romela diprotšeke ka emeile ka lepokising la go tsena
registry.empty.title: Ga go na diprotšeke tšeo di sa tšwago go gatišwa
registry.empty.body: IATF e lokišetša sehlopha sa yona sa mathomo sa merero ya phatlalatša.
proposal.form.title: Romela kgopelo
proposal.form.body: Tlatša foromo ye e lego ka mo tlase go romela kgopelo go IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript e a nyakega go šomiša foromo ye ya web. Ge e le gore ga e gona, šomiša emeile goba Discord legatong la yona.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Go romela ka go phela ga se gwa beakanywa mo tikologong ye. Foromo ye e tla bula morekiši wa gago wa emeile legatong la yona.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Go lokišetša go romelwa mo go šireletšegilego...
proposal.form.ready: Ge o romela kgopelo, IATF e tla dira rekoto ya go amogela.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Hle tlatša tlhahlobo ya tšhireletšo ya spam pele o e romela.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Tšhireletšo ya di-spam e fedile. Hle lekola gape pele o romela.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Tšhireletšo ya Spam ga e kgone go netefatšwa mo lebakeng le. Ka kgopelo leka gape.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Tšhireletšo ya Spam e fedile. Ka kgopelo leka go lekola gape.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Hle tlatša dikgoba tše di nyakegago pele o romela.
proposal.form.success: Kgopelo ya gago e amogetšwe gomme ya bolokwa bakeng sa go hlahlobja.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ge e ba o ikgokaganya le IATF gape mabapi le kgopelo ye, akaretša tšhupetšo ka mo tlase.
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Rekoto ya go amogela yeo e bulegilego
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Go bile le phošo ge o romela kgopelo. Ka kgopelo leka gape. Ge bothata bo tšwela pele, šomiša emeile legatong la seo.
proposal.subjectUntitled: Kgopelo yeo e se nago leina
project.detail.eyebrow: Go tsena ga setšhaba ka gare ga projeke
project.detail.problemTitle: Morero wo o rarolla bothata bofe
project.detail.whyTitle: Lebaka leo ka lona modiro wo o lego gona
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: Ka ntle ga lefelo la tirišo
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Mothopo wa Seisemane se se tlwaelegilego, diphetolelo di ka oketšwa ka morago
footer.label: Letlakala la ka tlase la Wepesaete
footer.howToContribute: Kamoo o ka thušago ka gona
footer.blurb: Mošomo wa go dira gore batho ba kgone go fihlelela dilo o swanetše go ba bonolo go o thoma, go o gatiša le go dula o bulegile.
footer.source: Tšhupetšo ya ditekanyetšo tša go fihlelela: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Mekgwa yeo e theilwego ke badiriši ba thekinolotši ya go thuša.
contact.label: Kgokagano
translation.label: Boemo bja phetolelo
translation.source: Seisemane ke leleme la motheo la letlakala le.
translation.humanReviewed: Phetolelo ye e ile ya hlahlobja ke seboledi se se nago le bokgoni.
translation.machineAssisted: Phetolelo ye e thušwa ke motšhene gomme ga se ya hlwa e hlahlobja ka botlalo ke seboledi seo se nago le tsebo. Ditšhišinyo di amogelwa ka GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Phetolelo ye e ile ya hlahlobja pele ga ge mothopo wa Seisemane o ka mpshafatšwa gomme go ka nyakega gore e hlahlobje gape.
